description: Construct a 3 story 11989 s.f. mixed used building as per plans, BZA#255-12 & 12-27386-HDLC 1st and 2nd floor: 7666 sq ft restaurant; 3rd floor: 3 apartments. (Signs require a seperate permit) This TCO expires on 1/31/2015 During the term of this Temporary Occupancy, the following actions must be taken. Failure to complete these requirements will result in the rescission of occupancy following this 30-day period and no further occupancy will be granted until the structure is fully compliant: 1) The building shall operate as a standard restaurant, in compliance with all standards of the Building Code, Comprehensive Zoning Ordinance, and the City Code. 2) All building code deficiencies will be remedied, either through the Board of Building Standards and Appeals or through modifications to the structure. 3) All deviations from HDLC approved plans will be remedied. 4) Occupancy of the second floor shall not exceed 49 persons. 5) No occupancy is granted for the third floor of the structure. 6) Use of the bar on the second floor is prohibited under any and all circumstances 7) Application will be filed for renewal of the variances granted under BZA Docket 255-12. Previously granted variances have expired. 8) Application will be filed for the retention of the second floor holding bar which exceeds the square footage allowable pursuant to Section 11.51 of the CZO (alternatively this bar may be physically removed from the structure).
